description:
A self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality.

Creality Print is a self-developed Fused deposition modeling slicing software produced by Creality. It’s a practical and easy-to-use tool that can help you remote control and monitor your 3D printer and help print directly from your computer.
1. Improved under-extrusion after overhangs for better surface quality

2. Optimized color change sequence, reducing purge by ~10%

3. Added Support Interface Ironing for improved bottom surfaces

4. Introduced Fuzzy Skin painting for localized texture control

5. Added custom ear-shaped brim for precise adhesion

6. Introduced wall-infill interlocking for stronger parts

7. Integrated MakeNow for a seamless workflow

8. Added material usage breakdown in G-code preview

9. Reduced rendering memory usage by ~10%

10. Fixed multiple stability and functional issues

##https://wiki.creality.com/en/software/6-0/release-notes-7-1-0
